mapper.sql: bugr.id, bugr.created_time, bugr.created_timestamp, bugr.created_by, bugr.created_id, bugr.modified_time, bugr.modified_timestamp, bugr.modified_by, bugr.modified_id, bugr.deleted, bugr.version, bugr.remark, bugr.user_group_id, bugr.role_id
mapper.delete: delete from user_group_role where id in
delete from user_group_role where user_group_id in
delete from user_group_role where role_id in
